name: @prune/clearing-price
description: F18 — Token Clearing-Price Controller. Maintains one price lambda (the marginal value of a token in quality units) via a PID loop over the cost-SLO error budget, and exposes the single bid rule every actuator consults: act iff qualityGain >= lambda * tokenCost. lambda rises when over budget (stingier) and falls when under (more generous), so pruning, routing, and reasoning-effort are coordinated by one number. A null quote (quality unknown) makes every consumer no-op — the controller never forces a change it cannot price. Pure control math; no regex, no model call, no fabricated tokens.
